creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Mar 11 02:39:59 2014
New Revision: 347834
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/347834
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r347834/

Log:
  - Update to 0.2.3
  
  PR:		187293
  Submitted by:	Ports Fury

Modified:
  head/audio/qsampler/Makefile
  head/audio/qsampler/distinfo
  head/audio/qsampler/pkg-plist

Modified: head/audio/qsampler/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/qsampler/Makefile	Tue Mar 11 02:39:07 2014	(r347833)
+++ head/audio/qsampler/Makefile	Tue Mar 11 02:39:59 2014	(r347834)
@@ -2,25 +2,24 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	qsampler
-PORTVERSION=	0.2.2
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.3
 CATEGORIES=	audio
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME}%20%28stable%29/${PORTVERSION} \
+MASTER_SITES=	SF \
 		http://download.linuxsampler.org/packages/
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Qt-based front end to LinuxSampler
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2 # (or later)
-LICENSE_FILE=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING
 
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libgig.so:${PORTSDIR}/audio/libgig \
 		liblscp.so:${PORTSDIR}/audio/liblscp
 RUN_DEPENDS=	linuxsampler:${PORTSDIR}/audio/linuxsampler
 
+USES=		gmake shared-mime-info
 USE_QT4=	corelib gui \
 		linguist_build moc_build qmake_build rcc_build uic_build
-USES=		gmake
+QT_NONSTANDARD=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ENV=	ac_cv_path_ac_qmake=${QMAKE} \
 		ac_cv_path_ac_moc=${MOC} \
@@ -28,9 +27,7 @@ CONFIGURE_ENV=	ac_cv_path_ac_qmake=${QMA
 		ac_cv_path_ac_rcc=${RCC} \
 		ac_cv_path_ac_lupdate=${LUPDATE} \
 		ac_cv_path_ac_lrelease=${LRELEASE}
-
-post-patch:
-	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|make -f|$$(MAKE) -f|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.in
+INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
 post-configure:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${QMAKE} -o ${PORTNAME}.mak \

==============================================================================

+++ head/audio/qsampler/distinfo	Tue Mar 11 02:39:59 2014	(r347834)

-SHA256 (qsampler-0.2.2.tar.gz) = 527127e8ba279fdab88bd1731fafaccb6b7beb5394c5c30a5275b85cbb7857ad
-SIZE (qsampler-0.2.2.tar.gz) = 215734
+SHA256 (qsampler-0.2.3.tar.gz) = 67468952424bf7d6d4e10e6135817d3d9d019f16a740eaf679828b3049f5cb7e
+SIZE (qsampler-0.2.3.tar.gz) = 256744

Modified: head/audio/qsampler/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/qsampler/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 11 02:39:07 2014	(r347833)
+++ head/audio/qsampler/pkg-plist	Tue Mar 11 02:39:59 2014	(r347834)
@@ -1,4 +1,9 @@
 bin/qsampler
 share/applications/qsampler.desktop
+share/icons/hicolor/32x32/apps/qsampler.png
+share/icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes/application-x-qsampler-session.png
+share/icons/hicolor/scalable/apps/qsampler.svg
+share/icons/hicolor/scalable/mimetypes/application-x-qsampler-session.svg
+share/locale/qsampler_cs.qm
 share/locale/qsampler_ru.qm
-share/pixmaps/qsampler.png
+share/mime/packages/qsampler.xml
